title: Famous Temples in Jammu & Kashmir
description:
Jammu & Kashmir is not just about Vaishno Devi Temple—there’s so much more to explore.

From the grand Raghunath Temple to the sacred Ranbireshwar Temple… and the riverside Bawe Wali Mata Temple.

In Kashmir, visit the holy Amarnath Cave Temple, the ancient Martand Sun Temple, and the hilltop Shankaracharya Temple overlooking Dal Lake.

Don’t miss Kheer Bhawani Temple and Mamleshwar Temple for their unique spiritual charm.

Which one have you visited… and which is on your list?

Comment below and follow @realnehagupta for more such content.
